---
title: "Instagram"
subtitle: "Platform Appendix"
platform_slug: "instagram"
ugc_answers_files:
  - data/2025/global/instagram/ugc.yml
ads_answers_files:
  - data/2025/regional/BR/instagram/ads.yml
  - data/2025/regional/EU/instagram/ads.yml
  - data/2025/regional/UK/instagram/ads.yml
---

```{python}
#| label: setup
#| include: false

import sys
from pathlib import Path

project_root = Path.cwd()
while not (project_root / 'utils').exists() and project_root != project_root.parent:
    project_root = project_root.parent
if str(project_root) not in sys.path:
    sys.path.insert(0, str(project_root))

from utils.responses_aggregator import generate_platform_question_sections
```

## User-Generated Content

```{python}
#| label: ugc-questions
#| echo: false
#| output: asis

generate_platform_question_sections(
    platform="instagram",
    question_type="ugc",
    year="2025",
    heading_level=3,
)
```

## Advertising

```{python}
#| label: ads-questions
#| echo: false
#| output: asis

generate_platform_question_sections(
    platform="instagram",
    question_type="ads",
    year="2025",
    heading_level=3,
)
```
